use_cases: Top-level navigation between app sections like Home, Search, About, and FAQ pages
Category or filter switching in dashboards and content management interfaces
Segment selection in settings panels or user preference interfaces
Tab-based view switching in SaaS applications and admin dashboards
Navigation pills in mobile-friendly responsive layouts
ai_summary: An animated chip tab navigation component using Framer Motion for smooth pill morphing transitions between selected states. Features gradient-filled active tabs that slide between options, with hover states for unselected items. Designed for lightweight navigation in SaaS, dev-tools, and general web applications with a clean, modern aesthetic.
